note: All 110 validated unique bugs are numerical-divergence bugs between compiler/runtime backends. The frontend gate is pytorch_eager (onnx2torch + eager). ORT is in the reference cluster for 100% of bugs, so none are classified as ONNX conversion/export bugs. No crash-only unique bugs are present.
